input: spatiotemporal behavior logs (sessions with location, start time, end time, and item sequence)
output: user embeddings for predicting demographic attributes
backbone: calendar graph neural network (tripartite network + hierarchical calendar network)
key_idea: model spatiotemporal user behaviors via a tripartite network of items, sessions, and locations, and a hierarchical calendar network capturing multiple periodicities
datasets: real-world mobile app news click logs
